title: alchemilla glaberrima proles firma
intro: Alchemilla glaberrima proles firma, also known as lady's mantle, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae) and native to Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory agent and astringent, to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Alchemilla glaberrima proles firma include reducing menstrual cramps and bloating, as well as soothing digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dyspepsia. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
